string.text: Keeps your inventory "favorite" (green) and "junk" (red) marks from Sorting Plus across new games. Requires Sorting Plus, duh.
Master switch. Off = Sorting Plus is left completely untouched (marks stay per-save as normal). Why would you disable this?
Carry the green favorite list across playthroughs.
Carry the red junk list across playthroughs. A section is favorite OR junk, never both.
Permanently delete the persistent file and clear all favorite/junk marks from your current game.
Delete ALL remembered favorites and junk marks? This empties the saved file and clears the marks in your current game. This cannot be undone.
Logs for development and bug reporting.
